siteId.description: ID of the site containing the collection whose items to add to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

collectionId.description: ID of the collection to add an item to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

live.description: Whether the item should be published on the live site

fieldId.description: Field to set for the item to create. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fieldValue.description: Value to set for the item to create

fieldId.description: Field to set for the item to create. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fieldValue.description: Value to set for the item to create

itemId.description: ID of the item to update

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return
